overview.description: Slovak IT services company with Czech branch offering AI consulting, custom AI development, and Microsoft-based AI solutions
overview.description_long: exe is a 35-year-old IT systems integrator with offices in Bratislava and Prague, offering AI strategy consulting, custom AI development, Microsoft Copilot/Azure AI integration, cloud & infrastructure, cybersecurity, virtual training systems, and software localization. They focus on B2B enterprise clients, delivering data analytics, GenAI applications, NLP, computer vision, and MLOps services. Microsoft Country Partner of the Year 2019.
overview.tagline: Tomorrow starts today. Let your ideas speak.

history.origin_story: Founded in 1990 in Slovakia as a software and DTP services company by Slovak entrepreneurs. Became one of the first official Microsoft partners in Czechoslovakia in 1991.

key_milestones.event: Company founded in Slovakia as a software and DTP services firm
Became one of the first official Microsoft partners in Czechoslovakia
Opened Czech Republic branch; co-founded Business Software Alliance CS
Achieved Microsoft Gold Certified Partner and ISO 9001:2000 certification
Developed proprietary process management solution exeCUTE
Won Microsoft Country Partner of the Year 2019 award in Las Vegas

awards: Microsoft Country Partner of the Year 2019
MS Industry Awards 2010 – Best Productivity Solution

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: exe's core value is Microsoft-centric IT consulting and integration. As AI tools like Copilot become more self-service and easier to deploy without consultants, demand for basic implementation services may commoditize. However, their 35-year enterprise relationships, multi-service portfolio (cloud, cybersecurity, localization), and deep Microsoft partnership provide meaningful stickiness.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established 35-year-old IT services company with 1,500+ enterprise customers across Slovakia, Czech Republic, and beyond. The market for Microsoft-stack IT services and AI integration is growing, not shrinking.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped profitable enterprise with 35 years of operations, 1,500 satisfied customers, and 700 completed projects. No external funding needed; self-sustaining revenue from diversified IT services.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Financially stable and market-proven, but primarily a services reseller/integrator with limited proprietary AI IP. Medium-term risk as GenAI commoditizes integration work, though diversified service lines (localization, cybersecurity, virtual training, cloud) provide resilience.

metadata.notes: exe is a Slovak company (exe, a.s., IČO: 17321450, registered in Bratislava) with a Czech branch (odštěpný závod) at Hvězdova 1716/2b, Praha 4. Website exe.cz redirects to exe.sk. Founded 1990. 57 certified specialists noted on homepage (likely a subset of total headcount). Melbourne branch opened 2001 — current status unknown.
